Widows (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $42,402,632Details
International Box Office $33,582,068
Worldwide Box Office $75,984,700
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,764,074
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,843,905
Total $5,607,979
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of four women with nothing in common except a debt left behind by their dead husbands’ criminal activities. Set in contemporary Chicago, amid a time of turmoil, tensions build when Veronica, Alice, Linda and Belle take their fate into their own hands and conspire to forge a future on their own terms.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,361,307 (29.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,803 opening theaters/2,803 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $55,664,423

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 16th, 2018 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: November 6th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 15th, 2018 (Wide), released as Widows: Eredità criminale (Italy)
November 16th, 2018 (Wide), released as Viúvas (Portugal)
November 16th, 2018 (Wide), released as Вдовици (Bulgaria)
November 16th, 2018 (Wide), released as Našlės (Lithuania)
Video Release: January 22nd, 2019 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence, language throughout, and some sexual content/nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2530 (Cert #51639), 6/6/2018)
Running Time: 129 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Boxing, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Heist, Money Troubles
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Regency, See-Saw Films, Regency Enterprises, 20th Century Fox, Lammas Park
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English

Synopsis

The story of four women with nothing in common except a debt left behind by their dead husbands’ criminal activities. Set in contemporary Chicago, amid a time of turmoil, tensions build when Veronica, Alice, Linda and Belle take their fate into their own hands and conspire to forge a future on their own terms.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,361,307 (29.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,803 opening theaters/2,803 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $55,664,423

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 16th, 2018 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: November 6th, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 15th, 2018 (Wide), released as Widows: Eredità criminale (Italy)
November 16th, 2018 (Wide), released as Viúvas (Portugal)
November 16th, 2018 (Wide), released as Вдовици (Bulgaria)
November 16th, 2018 (Wide), released as Našlės (Lithuania)
Video Release: January 22nd, 2019 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence, language throughout, and some sexual content/nudity.
